title: Cross-Repo Proposal Link
description: Atomic link between proposals across sister repos (anima/hexa-lang/airgenome/nexus). Emitted by tool/proposal_sync_hub.hexa. SSOT 는 각 repo 의 state/proposals/inventory.json _meta.cross_repo_links[].

id.description: Deterministic dedup key: sha256(src_repo + src_id + tgt_repo + tgt_id + link_type), 16 hex chars

src_id.description: Proposal id with repo-prefix (e.g. anima-20260422-042, hxa-20260422-007, agm-20260422-001, nxs-20260422-003)

link_type.description: depends_on: src needs tgt to be implemented first. satisfies: src problem solved by tgt. conflicts_with: cannot coexist. mirrors: parallel proposal in tgt repo. cluster_member: 5+ proposals form a cluster (xrp-NNN super-proposal).

evidence.description: Optional: file path that triggered the link detection

last_verified_ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC, last hub run that re-confirmed this link

auto_link_score.description: Confidence 0-100. <30 = weak (manual review), 30-70 = medium, 70+ = strong (auto-mirror OK)

user_confirmed.description: If true, link is sticky — auto-decay disabled

decay_after_misses.description: If hub fails to re-detect this link N consecutive runs, mark stale and move to debate folder
